results.rendered_html:
abhi-√ghrā -jighrati (ind.p. -jighrya,  Gobh. ) to snuffle, smell at;
to bring the nose close to another's forehead in caressing, or as a token of affection,  TS.  &c.;
to smell, scent,  Kād.
